display_name: Grok-4.1-Fast-Non-Reasoning is a streamlined companion to Grok 4.1 Fast, xAI’s best agentic tool‑calling model. It has 2M context window and high responsiveness but is optimized for non‑reasoning task
description: Grok-4.1-Fast-Non-Reasoning is a streamlined companion to Grok 4.1 Fast, xAI’s best agentic tool‑calling model. It has 2M context window and high responsiveness but is optimized for non‑reasoning tasks — excelling at text generation, summarization, and automated workflows that demand speed and efficiency over deep logic. Ideal for high-throughput use cases like customer support automation, bulk content creation, and fast conversational responses.
